chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application Nos.2180 & 2181 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail case. 30.12.2025 Haji Akbar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. Sindh. Complainant present in person. SIP Abdul Wahid of PS Mouchko / AVLC. ----------------------------- After hearing the bail applications at length, the learned counsel for the applicant does not press these bail applications and requests that appropriate directions may be given. Consequently, these bail applications stand dismissed with direction to the trial Court to record the evidence within two months in accordance with the law. In the meanwhile, the Additional I.G. Accountability shall enquire from SSP AVLC Mr. Khalid Mustafa Korai and the I.O. of the case for the failure to recover the case property in the present street crime and shall submit his report within thirty days. Office is directed to place a copy of this order in the above connected bail application. J U D G E Asif
